session.user: Run ruff check and ruff format check on the modified files and report results. Commands: 1. ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py 2. ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py
session.assistant: I'll run both ruff check and ruff format check on the specified files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff check on modified files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff format check on modified files

session.assistant:
Perfect! Both checks passed:
**ruff check**: All checks passed!
**ruff format**: Both files are already properly formatted: - src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py - tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py
The modified files meet all code quality and formatting standards.
